items.title: 5 Debt and Housing Metrics Investors Should Consider Before Buying S&P 500 Stocks at All-Time Highs
items.description: Lower interest rates will help ease consumer pressures, but a recovery in the housing market could take time.

items.title: 2 High-Dividend Stocks That Are Still Dirt Cheap
items.author: Matt Frankel
items.description: Despite challenging market conditions, two real estate investment trusts (REITs) offer promising long-term investment opportunities: EPR Properties and Prologis, which provide attractive dividends and potential growth in experiential and logistics real estate sectors.

items.title: 6 Pros of BNPL and a Note of Caution
items.author: Dana George
items.description: Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) is a payment method allowing consumers to split purchases into four interest-free installments, with major players like Affirm, Klarna, and Afterpay dominating the market. The industry is expected to reach $125 billion by 2027, offering flexible payment options without hard credit checks.
